summary: Keith O'Brien is a B2B content strategist and executive ghostwriter and former editor-in-chief of PRWeek. Founder of Total Emphasis (2017). Operator-ghostwriter for B2B founders and executives, building the systems his work runs on. Based in Brooklyn.
bio: Keith O'Brien is a B2B content strategist and executive ghostwriter based in Brooklyn and the founder of Total Emphasis. He was the editor-in-chief of PRWeek (and DMN) before founding the practice in 2017. He has been a reporter since 2004 and has produced 100+ published bylines in outlets including Forbes, Fast Company, AdExchanger, Digiday, Entrepreneur, and The Drum; his bylines archive at https://www.keithrobrien.com/bylines tracks 400+ published pieces since 2004. Publicly named Total Emphasis engagements include IBM, Realeyes, UpWave, UST, 33 Across, Grip, Battenhall, and M&C Saatchi Performance. As an operator-ghostwriter, he builds the systems the work runs on: a Jersey Shore publication with newsletter pipeline, MCP servers for his CRM and articles index, a desktop workflow app, and a music publication. keithrobrien.com is the personal hub; totalemphasis.com is the business.
isNot: The late Cardinal Keith O'Brien of Scotland
The Irish boxer of the same name
Keith O'Brien the longform nonfiction author (Paradise Falls, Outside Shot, Heartland)
Keith O'Brien the U.S. steeplechase jockey
